title: Game Creatures [Cobblemon]
description: Add creatures from other games to Cobblemon.
body:
Game Creatures
-
Do u want to play with enemies and allies from other games as Pokémon? Game Creatures adds several creatures from different games into Cobblemon!

Each species is created with care and attention to detail so that it blend in with the atmosphere and style of the mod.

_This project is created by fans for everyone!_
